title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEMS EIGHTY-ONE, EIGHTY-TWO, EIGHTY-THREE, AND EIGHTY-FOUR, SUBSECTION d, FOR THE PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN

chunks.text:
H. No. 5031 / 52 OG No. 7, 3533 (July, 1956)

[ Republic Act No. 1466, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEMS EIGHTY-ONE, EIGHTY-TWO, EIGHTY-THREE, AND EIGHTY-FOUR, SUBSECTION d, FOR THE PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Items eighty-one, eighty-two, eighty-three, and eighty-four, subsection d, for the Province of Antique, section three of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, are amended to read as follows:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.
